hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black -q "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff and black after edits

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if command -v mypy >/dev/null 2>&1; then mypy --no-error-summary "$file" 2>/dev/null | head -20; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Run mypy type checking after editing Python files

hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then if grep -n 'print(' "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '#.*print' | head -5; then echo '[WARNING] print() statements detected - consider using logging module'; fi; fi

PostToolUse.description: Warn about print() statements in edited Python files

hooks.command: changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$' || true); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then for f in $changed; do if grep -n 'print(' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '#.*print' | head -3; then echo "[WARNING] print() in $f - use logging"; fi; if grep -n 'import pdb' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[WARNING] pdb import in $f - remove before commit"; fi; if grep -n 'breakpoint()' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[WARNING] breakpoint() in $f - remove before commit"; fi; done; fi

Stop.description: Check for debug statements in modified Python files
